evidence_rows.reading: V1.11 opened lawfully as an exploration-layer infrastructure phase.
The phase produced a repeatable upstream acquisition basis that changes the future decision basis.
The phase remains below admission and strategy layers, so closure preserves the design basis rather than auto-opening a pilot.

interpretation: V1.11 has completed its exploration-layer mission by defining how sustained catalyst evidence should be acquired and recorded.
That is enough to close the design phase successfully without auto-opening another phase.
Per current governance, the correct next posture is waiting state until an owner-authorized pilot or trigger appears.
